children.label: a
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), the period during which a person entitled to educational assistance under this chapter may use such person’s entitlement expires on the date the person is separated from the Selected Reserve.

children.label: A
children.text: who is separated from the Selected Reserve because of a disability which was not the result of the individual’s own willful misconduct incurred on or after the date on which such person became entitled to educational assistance under this chapter; or

children.label: B
children.text: who, on or after the date on which such person became entitled to educational assistance under this chapter ceases to be a member of the Selected Reserve during the period beginning on , and ending on , or the period beginning on , and ending on , by reason of the inactivation of the person’s unit of assignment or by reason of involuntarily ceasing to be designated as a member of the Selected Reserve pursuant to ,October 1, 1991December 31, 2001October 1, 2007September 30, 2014section 10143(a) of this title
The provisions of shall apply to the period of entitlement prescribed by subsection (a).section 3031(f) of title 38

The provisions of shall apply to the period of entitlement prescribed by subsection (a) in the case of a disability incurred in or aggravated by service in the Selected Reserve.section 3031(d) of title 38

children.label: A
children.text: the period of such active duty service plus four months shall not be considered in determining the expiration date applicable to such member under subsection (a); and

children.label: B
children.text: the member may not be considered to have been separated from the Selected Reserve for the purposes of clause (2) of such subsection by reason of the commencement of such active duty service.

In any case in which the Secretary concerned determines that a person entitled to educational assistance under this chapter has been prevented from using such person’s entitlement due to an emergency situation, the Secretary concerned shall extend the period of entitlement prescribed in subsection (a) for a period equal to the number of months that the person was so prevented from using such entitlement, as determined by the Secretary.

children.label: c
children.text: In this section, the term “emergency situation” has the meaning given such term in .section 3601 of title 38
